nasb.text: The voice of one crying in the wilderness, ‘Make ready the way of the Lord, Make His paths straight.’ ”

esv.text: the voice of one crying in the wilderness: ‘Prepare the way of the Lord, make his paths straight,’”

cnv.text: 在曠野有呼喊者的聲音： ‘預備主的道， 修直他的路！’”

ccb.text: 他在旷野大声呼喊， ‘预备主的道， 修直祂的路。’”

csbs.text: 在旷野有声音呼喊着： ‘你们当预备主的道， 当修直    他的路！’    ”
